title: Aromaster Burr Coffee Grinder, Coffee Bean Grinder with 25 Grind Setting, 2-12 Cups Timer, Conical Coffee Grinders for Home Use, 3-Ears Portafilter Holder, Cleaning Brush, Black
description:
About this item
51-53mm Portafilter Holder : Using the holder, you can grind coffee beans directly into the portafilter, which could save you time and help make Espresso coffee with ease. If your portafilter doesn't fit it, you can also choose 5.6oz large capacity grinding chamber.NOTE: The holder is only suitable for 3- ears 51-53mm portafilter
25 Grind Setting and 2-12 Cups Timer : The burr coffee grinder offers a range of 25 grind settings, allowing you to tailor the grounds' size according to your preferred brewing method from French Press to Espresso.2-12 cups quantity selection settings to grind the exact quantity you need for a single cup
Stainless Conical Burr : High-quality conical burr provides uniform and precise grinding, resulting in an optimal coffee extraction process. The removable upper burr, hopper, chamber, and included brush make it easy to clean
Upgraded DC Motor : The coffee grinders adopt a new generation of DC motors, efficient and quiet. Its compact design and easy-to-use functions make it ideal for home use in any size kitchen.
After-sales Service : AROMASTER's conical burr coffee grinder provides a full 12 month repair service. If you have any concerns during use, please get in touch with us whenever you need. We will reply you within 24 hours. We value your feedback and are eager to hear from you.
reviews_5s:
It grinds fine, and -- at least so far -- there is little static cling of the grounds to the bin receiving them. It is also relatively quiet. It was a bit messy trying to grind straight into the coffee maker's grounds holder, so we don't use that option.This grinder ensures consistent particle size distribution, allowing me to finely tune my grind size to match my brewing method. I can just grind the amount that I need for one day, keeping the coffee bean fresh. The machine is easy to install, use and clean. Tip: The cleaning brush is hidden under the bean hopper lid.Adjustable down to very fine Expresso grind. Conical burr is awesome
Quiet and fast grinding...3x faster than my last grinder.This is a decent grinder. Compact in size and fast grinding. It is expresso portafilter compatible, I guess it’s time to get a expresso machine now.Works fine. I drink espresso and the burr grinder was excellent for grinding the fineness of my beans.The settings were easy and pretty precise.I really like the machine and it’s pretty small to fit into the backpack. I carry it to the Airbnb and make a decent coffee in the morning. My friends really like it.Really like the compact design. Fit my space perfectly. Low noise level. I mainly use it for dripping coffee grinds, and it also fit my Breville Portifilter well. It’s cheaper than the same model of other colors. The gap between the container and grinder head is tight, so on messy powders.The grinder's sleek and compact design makes it a space-saving addition to any kitchen countertop, and also easy to use, simple operation ensures the coffee lover can enjoy freshly ground coffee with ease. My friend gave me a Nespresso machine for my x’mas gift. This machine ensuring a perfect fit and consistent results every time when I use my own pod, and I put the setting at 7 or 8.Works great. Consistent grind that matches the grind type. The grind on demand feature is so convenient keeping the beans fresh. Easy to set up and use. I would highly recommend this grinder.
